title: How to connect multiple boards to a main board with one single column
excerpt: Hello everyone I’m currently making boards for every single product I have and I want to connect those boards with a main board that holds the basic information of them (name, surname, status etc…) currently I’m using th…

posts.author: Gonzalo (Gonzalo Angel Alcala Vargas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone I’m currently making boards for every single product I have and I want to connect those boards with a main board that holds the basic information of them (name, surname, status etc…) currently I’m using the Monday integration that creates an item in a board and connects them with a column (image below)

image1047×209 7.41 KB

The problem is that everytime i want to use this automation I need to create a new column to link the product board with the main board (example below)

asdasdasd1363×827 67.2 KB

Want I want to achieve it’s one single column that can connect multiple boards , right now I only have 4 but in a future i want to have over 100 products and I don’t want to have 100 columns just for connecting boards.

Thx in advance

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Gonzalo ,instead of connecting them, how about making it the same item living on multiple boards? will that achieve your desired results? You can try that by using our app. Here Link to our App in the Marketplace
